DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant 45 Lansing Development, LLC's demurrer to the first, third and fourth causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Desert Fire Protection, L.P. is sustained as to all three causes of action without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
